exercises.title: Negotiation - Opening
exercises.instruction: Shadow this negotiation opening. Be clear and professional.
exercises.targetText: We're interested in exploring a partnership with your company.
tips: Emphasize key business terms: interested, exploring, partnership, company
Keep the tone professional but friendly

exercises.title: Making Suggestions
exercises.instruction: Practice stress patterns when making suggestions.
exercises.targetText: I suggest we consider a different approach.
tips: Stress the main ideas: suggest, consider, different, approach
Use a confident, not aggressive, tone

exercises.title: Professional Transitions
exercises.instruction: Link words smoothly in professional transitions.
exercises.targetText: In_addition_to that, I'd like_to mention the budget.

exercises.title: Complex Proposals
exercises.instruction: Break this proposal into clear thought groups.
exercises.targetText: Our proposal consists of three parts. First, the timeline. Second, the budget. Third, the deliverables.
chunks: Our proposal consists of three parts.
tips: Each part is its own short thought group
Stress: proposal, consists, three, timeline, budget, deliverables

exercises.title: Closing a Discussion
exercises.instruction: Shadow this closing. End discussions professionally.
exercises.targetText: Thank you for your time. I look forward to our next meeting.
tips: Stress: Thank, time, look, forward, next, meeting
End with a falling tone for the statement: ↘
